subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath quaffed the sealed wine, when the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting appeared, that His verses might draw him nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی الذی شرب الرحیق المختوم اذ اتی المهیمن القیوم لتجذبه آیات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
